title: Support latest Google Unified SDK to access Google AI Embedding Models
body:
This is a placeholder EPIC issue to support https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/embeddings.

New embedding model release announcement https://developers.googleblog.com/en/gemini-embedding-available-gemini-api/

All previous threads/issues of discussion should be consolidated into this issue.
author: ddobrin

comments.body: I will provide a PR by end of week

title: Add Thinking Config and Content Caching to the Google Gen AI Module
body:
A new module has been added `spring-ai-google-genai` to support the [Google Unified Gen AI SDK ](https://github.com/googleapis/java-genai).

The module matches all of the Google Vertex Gemini module.

New features supported by Gemini 2.0 and 2.5 models are being added to this module:
- support API Key - already available
- Thinking Budget support
- Content Caching support
- etc

This issue has been opened in support of adding thinking budget and content caching to the `spring-ai-google-genai` module
author: ddobrin
